title: Cow Drops OP Loot
description: Turn cows into an overpowered loot source for fun and accelerated survival gameplay.
body:
The Cow is OP datapack transforms cows into powerful and highly rewarding mobs in Minecraft. Instead of normal drops, cows now drop overpowered items, enchanted gear, or rare resources when defeated.

This adds a fun and chaotic twist to survival mode, turning peaceful farm animals into valuable loot sources.

Features

🐄 Cows drop OP items and rare loot

💎 Enchanted tools, weapons, and armor included

⚡ Fast survival progression

🎮 Vanilla-compatible mechanics

🌍 Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
